# Q5 join inner + fields + sort (lateral movement rdp)

**Dataset**: `gx_06_rdp` (synthetic scenario lab dataset — the technique transfers to your real datasets)

RDP lateral-movement hunting — remote-desktop connection patterns across hosts. Q5 join inner + fields + sort.

```sql
dataset = gx_06_rdp | join type = inner (dataset = gx_06_hosts) as h h.host = dst_host | alter dst_tier = tier | fields user, src_host, dst_host, dst_tier, ts | sort asc ts
```

_Live-verified on a real XSIAM tenant (returned 18). From the 20-scenario XQL coverage program; technique is dataset-portable._
